NAVAREA XIX 83/18
BARENTS SEA
SEISMIC SURVEY IN PROGRESS 03 JUL TO FURTHER NOTICE BY VESSEL RAMFORM ATLAS C6AX2 
TOWING 16 STREAMERS 6 NM IN LENGTH WITHIN AREA BOUNDED BY:
A.72-22N 024-46E

H.72-22N 024-46E
GUARD VESSELS IN ATTENDANCE: M/V THOR OMEGA, THOR FREYJA
VHF WORKING CH.72 AND 16 
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED
